name: Apple Notes Integration
promptBlock: Apple Notes app: There is no public API for third-party apps to create or edit notes inside the built-in Apple Notes app. If the user wants to "log to Apple Notes" or "save to the Notes app", store the content in your app and provide a Share action (ShareLink or UIActivityViewController) so the user can tap "Share to Notes." For programmable system integration, Reminders (EventKit) is an alternative when "reminder"-style logging is acceptable.
